acceptance_criteria: one parseable LLM-judge decision is recorded for every materialized fixture if the gate passes
provider calls and spend remain within ceilings
private labels are excluded from prompts
no benchmark, model, production, or SOTA claim occurs
falsifiers: provider calls or spend exceed ceilings
any fixture lacks a parseable LLM-judge decision after execution begins
stated_goal: Retry the provider LLM judge over frozen iter92 fixtures under the iter96 recovered prompt-budget, call, and spend ceilings.
